Who We Are

A Firm Built on
Trust & Expertise

Nexus Partners Solicitors & Advocates is a premier law firm headquartered in the heart of Kolkata, practicing before the Calcutta High Court and various civil and criminal courts across West Bengal.

We combine deep legal expertise with a client-first philosophy — ensuring every individual, family, and corporate entity we represent receives strategic, personalised, and results-oriented legal counsel.

Our team of seasoned advocates upholds the highest standards of professional ethics, bringing clarity, confidence, and competence to every case we undertake.

⚖

🏛

Client-Centric Approach
Our Expertise

Practice Areas

We offer comprehensive legal services across key areas of law, delivering expert representation and advice tailored to your specific needs.

⚖️
Civil Law

Expert handling of civil disputes, injunctions, declaratory suits, and civil appellate matters before trial courts and the High Court.

🔒
Criminal Law

Robust defence and prosecution in criminal matters — bail applications, anticipatory bail, Sessions cases, and High Court appeals.

🏢
Corporate Law

Advisory and litigation support for companies — contracts, compliance, disputes, M&A due diligence, and regulatory matters.

👨‍👩‍👧
Family Law

Sensitive, professional handling of divorce, custody, maintenance, succession, and matrimonial disputes with empathy and efficiency.

🏠
Property Law

Title verification, property disputes, landlord-tenant matters, evictions, and real estate transactions handled with precision.

Why Nexus Partners

Why Clients Choose Us

01 👨‍⚖️
Experienced Legal Professionals

Our advocates bring years of courtroom experience and deep domain expertise across civil, criminal, and corporate law — ensuring you get the best strategic representation.

02 🎯
Client-Focused Approach

We put your interests first. From the initial consultation to final resolution, every decision is made with your goals and wellbeing at the centre of our strategy.

03 💼
Strong Case Handling

Our meticulous preparation, thorough research, and aggressive yet measured advocacy ensure that every case receives the focused attention it deserves.

04 💬
Transparent Communication

We keep you informed at every stage — no legal jargon, no surprises. Clear, honest communication is the cornerstone of our client relationships.
